case_title: GREGORY S BOEGNER VS. SILVER CYBER TECH, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOEGNER, GREGORY S AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER CYBER TECH, INC. JOHN, EL ST AN IND, AS JOINT EMPLOYERS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOEGNER, GREGORY S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVER CYBER TECH, INC. JOHN, EL ST AN IND, AS JOINT EMPLOYERS $56,425.55 PRINCIPAL, $752.90 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $57,384.45, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
